artifacts.role: Baseline review, boundary, ordering, and safety contract

predecessorProductionPolicyAreas.productionPolicyAreaTitle: audit_logs: Allow authenticated users to read audit logs
predecessorProductionPolicyAreas.productionPolicyAreaDescription: PERMISSIVE SELECT policy for roles authenticated; USING=true; WITH CHECK=none. Authenticated users can insert and read every audit row; no tenant predicate.

policyTraceability.justification: Direct tenant-scoped replacement for the approved Production policy area.
policyTraceability.tenantIsolationEffect: Uses durable active membership/global operator authorization instead of broad or caller-asserted scope.
policyTraceability.privilegeTighteningEffect: Removes PUBLIC/anonymous or cross-clinic behavior and limits access to authenticated approved roles.

predecessorProductionPolicyAreas.productionPolicyAreaTitle: Authoritative role and clinic-membership model
predecessorProductionPolicyAreas.productionPolicyAreaDescription: Five application role strings are read from user_roles by email and enforced mainly in client components; database policies do not enforce roles or membership.

predecessorProductionPolicyAreas.productionPolicyAreaTitle: user_roles: Allow public read user roles
predecessorProductionPolicyAreas.productionPolicyAreaDescription: PERMISSIVE SELECT policy for roles PUBLIC; USING=true; WITH CHECK=none. PUBLIC can insert, read, and update all role assignments.

knownReleaseGates: Implement and test durable membership and global operator authorization.
Complete tenant-ownership and collision data preflights.
Pass isolated fresh-database parsing/execution and validation.
Create separately reviewed forward Production migrations.
canonicalizationMethod: UTF-8 without BOM; LF line endings; deterministic JSON insertion-key and array order; two-space indentation; one final LF. For README.md and the generation report only, the embedded manifest hash is replaced by the literal __AUTHORITATIVE_BASELINE_MANIFEST_SHA256__ before hashing to avoid a cryptographic reference cycle. sizeBytes always records final file bytes.

functionMatrix.identityArguments: uuid, text, uuid, text, text, text, timestamp with time zone, uuid, text, text, timestamp with time zone, integer, jsonb, jsonb, timestamp with time zone
functionMatrix.canonicalSignature: public.activate_deployment_clinic(uuid, text, uuid, text, text, text, timestamp with time zone, uuid, text, text, timestamp with time zone, integer, jsonb, jsonb, timestamp with time zone)
functionMatrix.returnType: TABLE(status text, clinic_id uuid, deployment_run_key text, session_id uuid, execution_key text, item_id uuid, execution_item_key text, plan_item_key text, clinic_state_before jsonb, clinic_state_after jsonb, activated_at timestamp with time zone, issue_code text, message text)
functionMatrix.tenantScopeBehavior: Validates clinic across durable deployment/run/session/item/entity relationships.
